name: Melted Paraffin
descs: When winning a Clash with a Skill that inflicts [Combustion] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn', inflict (# of remaining Coins/2) [Combustion] Potency on the target.
When winning a Clash with a Skill that inflicts [Combustion] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn', inflict (# of remaining Coins/2 + 1) [Combustion] Potency on the target.
When winning a Clash with a Skill that inflicts [Combustion] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn', inflict (# of remaining Coins + 1) [Combustion] Potency on the target.
